name: Heart Disease Prediction
desc: Data analytics project using Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn, and the UCI Cleveland Dataset to predict heart disease. Led the coding and team as Team Leader.

name: Cab Booking Portal
desc: Full-stack cab booking platform built with React.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, JWT authentication, and deployed on Windows Server with SSL. Led as Team Leader & Tester.

name: Video Conferencing App
desc: Real-time video conferencing application with meeting recording & saving features. Built with React, Node.js, Express, LiveKit SDK, Multer, and deployed on Render. Led as Team Leader & Backend Developer.
